CONTENT.Career: On 12 February 2022, Auzqui signed for Nemzeti Bajnokság I club Ferencvárosi TC.On 5 May 2023, he won the 2022–23 Nemzeti Bajnokság I with Ferencváros, after Kecskemét lost 1–0 to Honvéd at the Bozsik Aréna on the 30th matchday.In 2024, he moved to Chile and signed with O'Higgins in the top division.

SUMMARY: Carlos Daniel Auzqui (born 16 March 1991) is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as a winger for Chilean club O'Higgins.
